== Notes for [[Item:Q56988|Q56988]] ==

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/871/1/1133-9292_n110_p060-065.pdf

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/650/1/1133-9284_n102_p019-033.pdf

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/1088/1/0211-8998_n121_p307-321.pdf

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=53941

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
